# Jayashree Arunkumar

> Distinguished Member of Technical Staff at Wipro | Forbes Technology Council 2026 | Technology Advisory & Enterprise Architecture Excellence | Driving Ambient Enterprise transformation through AI-powered operating models.

## About

Jayashree Arunkumar is a Distinguished Member of Technical Staff at Wipro, specializing in Technology Advisory and Enterprise Architecture Excellence. She is a member of the Forbes Technology Council (2026) and was honored with the Women in Tech Leadership 2023 award by Analytics India Magazine for her impactful contributions to technology and mentoring.

She is deeply passionate about building solutions for global causes, including breast cancer awareness, sustainable ocean ecosystems, and accessibility. She has a strong track record of mentoring architects and engineering teams across the enterprise.

## Keywords

AI governance, agentic systems, multi-agent AI, data sovereignty, enterprise transformation, enterprise architecture, technology advisory, ambient enterprise, sustainable development, accessibility, women in tech

## Top Resources (Priority)

- [Forbes: Data Sovereignty For Multi-Agentic AI](https://www.forbes.com/councils/forbestechcouncil/2026/03/26/data-sovereignty-for-multi-agentic-ai-local-intelligence-global-insight/): Her latest article on data sovereignty in multi-agentic AI systems — local intelligence, global insight
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/iamjayashree/): Professional profile with full career history, endorsements, and publications
- [Portfolio Site](https://iamjayashree.github.io/JayashreeProfile/): Personal site with projects and contact information

## Areas of Expertise

- AI & Agentic Systems: Multi-agent AI architectures, AI governance, data sovereignty
- Enterprise Architecture: Technology advisory, ambient enterprise transformation, AI-powered operating models
- Social Impact: Breast cancer awareness solutions, ocean ecosystem sustainability, accessibility technology
- Leadership: Mentoring architects and engineering teams, Forbes Technology Council member

## Recognition

- Forbes Technology Council Member (2026)
- Women in Tech Leadership Award — Analytics India Magazine (2023)
